queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 8 OFFSET 4
SELECT sorter_model, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY sorter_model, operation_mode ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 6 OFFSET 2

WITH numbered AS (SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, _timestamp ASC) AS row_num FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, row_num FROM numbered WHERE row_num BETWEEN 5 AND 10 ORDER BY row_num

WITH reference AS (SELECT _timestamp FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5) SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE _timestamp > (SELECT _timestamp FROM reference) ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 8

WITH page AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, control_center, load_factor, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, _timestamp ASC) AS row_idx FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM page WHERE row_idx > 6 AND row_idx <= 14 ORDER BY row_idx ASC

SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode ORDER BY cnt DESC, avg_tput DESC LIMIT 6 OFFSET 3

WITH zoned AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM zoned WHERE rn BETWEEN 2 AND 4 ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, rn ASC
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, conveyor_lane, load_factor, charge_remaining FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL ORDER BY load_factor DESC, charge_remaining ASC LIMIT 7 OFFSET 7

WITH inner_page AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cell_temp DESC) AS temp_rank FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM inner_page WHERE temp_rank <= 8 UNION ALL SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cell_temp ASC) AS temp_rank FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL ORDER BY temp_rank ASC LIMIT 16

WITH dense_ranked AS (SELECT *, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS dr FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL), distinct_page AS (SELECT MIN(_timestamp) AS _timestamp, throughput_rate, dr FROM dense_ranked GROUP BY throughput_rate, dr) SELECT * FROM distinct_page WHERE dr > 3 AND dr <= 8 ORDER BY dr ASC
SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' AND action_subcategory = 'vitalsLcp' AND page_slug = 'itemPage' AND component_name LIKE '%scan%' LIMIT 20

results: ERROR: pallet PL-003 mismatch, retry url=https://warehouse.local/retry

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, visitor_session_id, action_category, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 15

results: SecurityException: unauthorized access to control_center CC-ALPHA

results: batch MNO456 merged into pallet PL-005

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, action_category, page_slug, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 ORDER BY latency_ms DESC LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND action_subcategory = 'vitalsLcp' AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'checkoutPage') AND (component_name LIKE '%lane%' OR component_name LIKE '%batch%') AND os_platform IN ('Mac OS X (iPhone)', 'Android 12', 'Android 14') LIMIT 10

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, action_category, page_slug, error_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation') ORDER BY (CASE WHEN error_code IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END), _timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT _timestamp, action_category, page_slug, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 ORDER BY latency_ms ASC, _timestamp ASC, page_slug ASC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 0
SELECT _timestamp, visitor_session_id, pallet_id, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, pallet_id ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 8 OFFSET 0
SELECT _timestamp, visitor_session_id, pallet_id, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, pallet_id ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 3

SELECT _timestamp, action_category, page_slug, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' ORDER BY (CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ASC, latency_ms DESC NULLS LAST, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 0

SELECT _timestamp, page_slug, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_rows, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY _timestamp) AS row_num FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 0
SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 0
SELECT _timestamp, component_name, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY latency_ms ASC LIMIT 3 OFFSET 2
SELECT pallet_id, SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY pallet_id ORDER BY total_rate DESC LIMIT 3 OFFSET 1
SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode ORDER BY avg_rate DESC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 2
WITH ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}") SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE rn BETWEEN 3 AND 5 ORDER BY rn

queries.sql: WITH paged AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}") SELECT facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate, rn FROM paged WHERE rn <= 2 ORDER BY facility_zone, rn LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, load_factor FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY load_factor DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 4 OFFSET 1
SELECT component_name, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY avg_lat ASC LIMIT 3 OFFSET 2
SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 200 ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 2 OFFSET 3
SELECT _timestamp, component_name, latency_ms, response_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY response_code ASC, latency_ms DESC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 0

WITH inner_page AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cell_temp DESC) AS temp_rank FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM inner_page WHERE temp_rank BETWEEN 3 AND 6 ORDER BY temp_rank
SELECT facility_zone, SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY total_rate DESC LIMIT 2 OFFSET 1
SELECT _timestamp, conveyor_lane, sorter_model, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY conveyor_lane ASC, throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 4 OFFSET 0
SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY cnt ASC LIMIT 3 OFFSET 2
SELECT _timestamp, operation_mode, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY operation_mode ASC, _timestamp DESC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 0
SELECT region_code, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE region_code IS NOT NULL AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY region_code ORDER BY avg_lat DESC LIMIT 3 OFFSET 2

WITH ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY _timestamp) AS rn FROM "{stream}") SELECT facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY facility_zone LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, item_count FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY item_count ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 3 OFFSET 1
SELECT org_name, scan_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY org_name, scan_category ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 4 OFFSET 2
SELECT _timestamp, component_name, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 100 ORDER BY latency_ms ASC LIMIT 2 OFFSET 2
